name: Reading Ruler
author: Kittylotus + ChatGPT
description: A tiny frontend-only frosted glass reading ruler for Lumiverse chat pages. Drag the pill handle to expand or collapse the glass from the input area upward; it avoids side panels, supports CSS variables, and has mobile composer fallbacks. Adds a native Input Bar Action inside the Lumiverse composer extras popover to show/hide the ruler without placing another floating button over app UI.
